title: Create: Renewable Industry
description: Balanced recipes to allow most non-treasure items to be renewable using Create
body:
Datapack that adds balanced recipes to allow most non-treasure items to be renewable using Create.

The ancient debris recipe is designed to be used with [Create Recycle Everything](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-recycle-everything) to get renewable diamonds from villager trades (which can also be automated by [Create: Trading Floor](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-trading-floor/version/zzKX2F0p)).

Full list of recipes added by the datapack:

crimsite/ochrum/veridium/asurine
- superheated mixing [tuff + 50mb potion of healing/fire resistance/night vision/slowness] into [crimsite/ochrum/veridium/asurine]

cinder flour/netherrack
- washing [blaze burner] into [empty blaze burner + 3 blaze rods + 50% blaze rod]
- washing [blaze powder] into [cinder flour]
- heated mixing [2 cinder flour + 25mb lava] into [netherrack]
- superheated compacting [cinder flour + 50mb lava] into [netherrack]

sponge/coral
- haunting [horn coral block] into [sponge]
- mixing [2 coral block types + 500mb water + dye] into [3 coral blocks + 75% dye]

nether ores
- heated mixing [cinder flour + 3 nether quartz] into [nether quartz ore]
- superheated mixing [netherrack + soul sand] into [nether gold ore + soul soil]
- washing [soul soil] into [2% bone]
- haunting [gold ore/deepslate gold ore/nether gold ore] into [gilded blackstone]
- superheated compacting [nether star + diamond block + 500mb potion of harming] into [95% nether star + ancient debris + 500mb potion of weakness]

calcite/tuff/deepslate
- crushing [limestone] into [calcite]
- heated compacting [calcite + deepslate] into [2 tuff]
- compacting [3 cobblestone + 100mb lava] into [2 deepslate]

crying obsidian
- haunting [obsidian] into [crying obsidian]
